description: A checkbox or date-of-birth assertion without documentary proof.
A staff member estimates age and may refuse or request proof.
A person inspects an accepted photo ID without scanning or retaining it.
A user submits an identity document to an online verifier.
A face image is used to estimate whether a user is above the threshold.
A verifier performs occasional full proofing and issues a reusable over-threshold credential.

method: In-person enrolment for later online access
description: A user verifies in person before receiving a reusable online credential.
